instructions: This is only the native coin balance. You MUST also call `get_tokens_by_address` to get the full portfolio.
Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/addresses/0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685/logs` to get Logs Emitted by Address.
Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/addresses/0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685/coin-balance-history-by-day` to get daily native coin balance history.
Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/addresses/0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685/coin-balance-history` to get native coin balance history.
Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/addresses/0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685/blocks-validated` to get Blocks Validated by this Address.
Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/proxy/account-abstraction/accounts/0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685` to get Account Abstraction info.

Use `direct_api_call` with endpoint `/api/v2/proxy/account-abstraction/operations` and query_params={'sender': '0x9c5C365e764829876243d0b289733B9D2b729685'} to get User Operations sent by this Address.
